sub_modules.fp_mult_unpack: Unpacks IEEE-754 operands, computes sign, effective exponents, significands, and special-case flags.
sub_modules.fp_mult_multiply: Multiplies 24-bit significands and computes biased exponent sum adjusted by the IEEE-754 bias.
sub_modules.fp_mult_normalize: Normalizes the 48-bit product and extracts guard, round, and sticky bits.
sub_modules.fp_mult_round: Applies round-to-nearest-even and adjusts exponent on rounding carry.
sub_modules.fp_mult_pack: Applies IEEE-754 special-case priority, overflow and underflow handling, and packs the final 32-bit result.
